div.p: RNG order mismatch → Training diverges after resume
Shard index wrong → Parameter corruption, NaN gradients
Config mismatch → Shape errors, cannot load state

g.text: ⚠️ RNG order MUST match save order

div.p: Each rank loads ONLY its owned shard. ZeRO-3: each DP rank owns param partition TP: each GPU owns weight columns/rows PP: each stage owns layer subset

text.tspan: Adam states: m, v per param
Adam states: m, v per param
